description: Finally arrives here. In a new, undamaged factory. Wilhelm has to help with the repair himself, otherwise it will take weeks.
Arrives at J-Staffel with Hollstein, finds mail waiting. Continues on to the column. 30 km on foot through mud and rain to the unit.

Back again from the front. Quarters on a straw mattress with the O.T. (Organisation Todt), electric light, cinema in the basement, old field kitchen. Christmas with roast pork, Stollen, sparkling wine, and red wine at the hotel.
Leaves the workshop in Rostov with Dauble's prime mover and a rear detachment. Ivan is said to already be in Rostov. Mail now takes a long time.
Ivan is roaming around with tanks too. A proper rear-area life with cinema and canteens. Comrades passing through. Quartered with an older woman, complete with knife, fork, plate, and cup.
Overnight in Zaporizhzhia on the way to the Crimea.
Ate at the soldiers' home. Rain and sleet.
Gets rid of the vehicles right away. Theater and cinema, well fed at the soldiers' home. Next day 40 km back, where the battalion is being assembled.

place: Crimean village at the Yaila Mountains
description: With the company in a village in the middle of the steppe. The company consists mostly of men returning from leave, nearly all familiar faces. Waiting for the battalion to cross over.
Arrived at the battery after 4 days' march and crossing. Hilly terrain, cozy bunkers. Big welcome. Wilhelm has been Obergefreiter since 1942-12-01.

place: Kuban on the beach (Sea of Azov)
description: Position change to the beach, because Ivan has attempted a landing. Bauer's truck and billet burn down because of a carelessly tossed cigarette. Eats sturgeon and caviar.
Back in the old position in the mountains. Very hot, no more swimming. Tropical clothing issued. Spieß Karius transferred.
Wilhelm is hit in the thigh by a submachine-gun round in an accident — about a 20 cm through-wound from below upward. Waiting to be transported back.
